title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map got fresher
gist.blurb: The API map has been regenerated from the live OpenAPI spec. One less chance for the docs to wander off from the hive.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference stays aligned with the deployed service.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API reference get documentation that matches the current production API.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly as a careful cartographer with a tiny explorer hat, updating a large API map beside a cozy retro terminal. The map has neat endpoint paths and code-plants growing around its edges, representing documentation staying in sync with the live API.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush and light blue wings, wearing a tiny explorer hat while updating a large API map beside a glowing retro terminal; code-plants and small flowers grow around the map, with a prominent lime green (#ecf874) glow. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, dark purple (#110518) pixel-font text on the map: 'API DOCS', nostalgic but beautiful.
